meta.title: BestOffers — Search-pipeline hardening test suite (397 cases — brand/type/accessory hardening added)
meta.author: bo-qa-lead-frontend
meta.status: DESIGNED — NOT YET RUN. The original 300-case synthetic suite reported 99% but real use immediately found a class of bug it missed (e.g. 'Samsung phone' -> Adonit STYLUSES: wrong brand AND wrong product-type/accessory). 97 new cases added: brand x product-type combos, accessory-leak traps (both directions), and real-user phrasings with the live failures locked as regressions. RUN AFTER the brand/type-relevance fix (currently in dev) lands.

step1_intent.note: pseudoId keeps each case un-metered (no freemium 402); use a DISTINCT pseudoId per case (e.g. qa-harness-E001).

step2_drive_clarifiers.note: ≥5-clarifier gate: skip every presented question (answer='__skip__') until state is 'results' or 'empty'. MIN_CLARIFIER_QUESTIONS=5. Guard: max 12 steps (skipToTerminal helper, clarifier-test-util.ts).

terminal_response_fields.cards: ResultCard[] — { productName, providerName, priceFils, priceLabel, deeplinkUrl, source, whyCitedAttribute, relation?, matchesPreferences? }
terminal_response_fields.broadenSuggestions: BroadenSuggestion[] — REQUIRED on a genuine (non-provider-failure) empty (F-SR1 AC-14, never a dead end)
terminal_response_fields.fallbackServed: boolean — true when no-match fallback augmented the set

global_pass_rules.GR1_clarifier_gate: Every case MUST present ≥5 clarifier questions before any terminal state (clarifierCount reaches totalQuestions, ≥5). A case that dispatches search before 5 = FAIL regardless of results.
global_pass_rules.GR2_truthful_data: Every card's priceFils/providerName/deeplinkUrl is REAL provider data, never LLM-fabricated. deeplinkUrl must be a well-formed http(s) URL on the provider's domain.
global_pass_rules.GR3_no_unrelated_dump: Results must NOT contain off-category/off-intent items just to fill the list. An honest-empty (state='empty' + broadenSuggestions) beats dumping unrelated cards.
global_pass_rules.GR4_honest_empty: state='empty' due to genuine no-match MUST carry ≥1 broadenSuggestion (never a bare 0-results). A provider-FAILURE empty must be flagged distinctly (coverage_reason, ADR-007 Q5) and must NOT be reported as a clean PASS.
global_pass_rules.GR5_price_sanity: No nonsensical prices: electronics within plausible KWD retail; food dish within plausible order KWD; RE rent 50–3,000 KWD/mo, sale ≥10,000 KWD. A rent card >3,000 KWD/mo = FAIL (price-unit trap).

failure_modes.FM-CATALOG: Electronics empty because term is off the in-code MOCK_SKUS catalog (ADR-007 RC#1). The headline Q1 fix target.
failure_modes.FM-RELEVANCE: Off-intent items leak in (rice→cake, unrelated restaurants, wrong-category). Hand-table gaps (ADR-007 RC#2).
failure_modes.FM-AREA: RE wrong-area leak / unlisted-area not resolved — 12-area allow-list vs ~60 real areas (ADR-007 RC#2/RC#3).
failure_modes.FM-TENURE: RE sale flat shown under rent query (or vice-versa); tenure inferred not asked (ADR-007 RC#3).
failure_modes.FM-PRICEUNIT: RE sale price shown as monthly rent (the 400k-rent class) (ADR-007 §1.3).
failure_modes.FM-TYPO: Misspelling/transliteration drift not normalized → wrong or empty (ADR-007 RC#2 cross-lingual).
failure_modes.FM-BRANDONLY: Brand-only query returns nothing or unrelated instead of that brand's catalog.
failure_modes.FM-OFFCATALOG: Generic/uncovered term should honest-empty with coverage_reason, not dump or silently zero.
failure_modes.FM-CONSTRAINT: Budget/spec/bedrooms/furnished constraint mishandled — over-budget mislabeled, spec ignored, or constraint dropped.
failure_modes.FM-GATE: Clarifier gate fails to reach ≥5 before dispatch.
failure_modes.FM-EMPTYUX: Genuine empty lacks broadenSuggestions (dead-end, F-SR1 AC-14).
failure_modes.FM-BRANDTYPE: Brand x product-type combo must return ONLY that brand AND that product-type (or honest-empty) — never another brand, never an accessory, never a different type. The 'Samsung phone -> Adonit stylus' bug class.
failure_modes.FM-ACCLEAK: Accessory-leak trap: a product query must NOT return its accessory (phone != stylus/case/charger; laptop != bag/stand); and the reverse — searching the accessory returns the accessory, not the base product.
failure_modes.FM-REALWORLD: Real-user phrasing (full sentences, 'i want to buy...', 'cheapest...', 'near me', AR equivalents) must route as well as a clean keyword query — no wrong brand, no accessory, no off-intent dump.
